en.title: Rephrase
en.prompt: Rephrase the following paragraph in 5 different ways, to avoid repetition, while keeping its meaning: [sentence to rephrase]
en.remark: Rewrite the specified content into multiple versions to avoid text duplication.

metaDescription: Sounding repetitive? Rephrase paragraphs in 5 different ways while keeping the original meaning. Improve readability and variety in your text instantly!

faq.q: Will paraphrased content still pass plagiarism checks?
faq.a: Simple word swaps and reordering by the AI still keep the plagiarism rate high. To actually reduce it, take all 5 versions and manually recombine: pick one or two sentences per paragraph, shuffle the order, and add your own cases and data. Pure AI output rarely drops below 30 percent duplication.

faq.q: How do I protect specific terminology from being rewritten?
faq.a: After the source text, list "keep the following terms as-is: X, Y, Z." The AI will otherwise swap "machine learning" into "algorithm training," which hurts technical accuracy. An explicit whitelist prevents pointless replacement of specialized terminology.
